business_description: Massage Addict Aurora is a professional massage therapy clinic offering a variety of therapeutic massage services. We specialize in regular massage, deep tissue massage, and hot stone massage treatments to help clients relax and recover.
full_address: 265 Edward St Unit 18, Aurora, ON L4G 3M7
highlights: Multiple massage therapy options including deep tissue and hot stone
Flexible session lengths with both 30 and 60-minute appointments
Professional massage clinic with convenient Aurora location
